description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a modern, rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The front yard is enclosed by a low fence and includes a grassy area, a paved patio, and a canopy structure for shade. The rear section of the property is landscaped with potted plants, a wooden deck, and a small pool or water feature. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and neutral tones, with some wooden accents visible on the deck and patio. The overall design emphasizes open, functional outdoor living areas and a clean, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped outdoor spaces including a patio, deck, and grassy yard. The design features clean lines, neutral colors, and a focus on open, functional living.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front yard with a grassy area, a canopy structure, and a fenced patio leading up to the main entrance and deck.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side elevation, showing the length of the property, the canopy, and the rear deck with potted plants.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear of the bungalow, focusing on the deck, pool or water feature, and the back entrance with large windows.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side elevation, emphasizing the landscaped areas, deck, and the overall rectangular shape of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large sliding glass doors and grouped windows
